insights.title: That's called tolerance — and it's on the map
insights.body: Needing more, or more intense, material over time has a name in the research: tolerance. It's one of the six markers the screening you're about to take was built to measure (Bőthe et al., 2020). Naming it is the first step to reversing it — your plan will target it directly.

insights.title: Trying before isn't a bad sign
insights.body: Most people arrive here having tried to stop on their own — that pattern is so common the screening measures it directly (Bőthe et al., 2020). Here's the useful part: the approaches tested in published trials are structured and skills-based, not willpower-based. You're not starting over. You're starting differently.
